defaultContent._rule: No default content defined; do not invent labels, icons, or copy. Use only what is in the spec or leave slots empty.

state.description: Layout only; wraps buttons. No client state; each button handles its own click.

examples.name: Edit and delete actions
examples.description: Card with edit and delete buttons

examples.name: Three actions
examples.description: Card with view, edit, and delete
